# SW Automotive

> SW Automotive is a full-service auto repair shop in Manassas, VA, providing honest, factory-level repairs at fair prices for all makes and models. ASE certified technicians. Diesel, hybrid, and EV capable. 27 years of dealership experience.

## Business Information

- **Type:** Auto Repair Shop (Licensed & Insured)
- **Address:** 10404 Morias Ct, Manassas, VA 20110
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM | Saturday–Sunday: Closed
- **Email:** info@sw-automotive.com
- **Website:** https://sw-automotive.com
- **Founded:** 2022 (4+ years serving Manassas, VA)

## Services Offered

- **Automotive Maintenance** — Factory-schedule preventive maintenance: oil changes, filters, fluids, belts, inspections
- **Auto Repair** — Full diagnostics, engine, drivetrain, electrical, and general repair for all makes and models
- **Diesel Repair** — Light duty diesel systems: fuel injection, EGR, DPF, DEF, turbocharger service
- **Small Engine Repair** — Lawn mowers, generators, pressure washers, chainsaws, tillers, snow blowers
- **Light Duty Diesel Repair** — Ford Power Stroke, GM Duramax, Ram Cummins diesel pickup trucks
- **Brake Replacement** — Brake pads, rotors, calipers, brake lines, full brake system inspection
- **Oil Changes** — Conventional, synthetic blend, full synthetic, and diesel oil changes; correct grade, no upsells
- **Transmission Repair** — Automatic and manual transmission diagnostics, fluid service, and full rebuilds

## Service Areas

Manassas, VA (primary) | Manassas Park, VA | Haymarket, VA | Gainesville, VA | Woodbridge, VA | Bristow, VA | Nokesville, VA | Centreville, VA

## Certifications

- ASE Certified
- Nissan Master Technician
- Light Duty Diesel Certified
- Hybrid & EV Certified

## Key Differentiators

- Owner/Lead Technician with 27 years at Nissan dealerships — Nissan Master Technician status
- ASE certified technicians on all vehicles
- Factory-level diagnostics and repairs at independent shop prices
- All makes and models serviced: Asian, Domestic, European
- Diesel, hybrid, and electric vehicle capable
- Written estimates before any work begins — no surprises
- No upsells — only what your vehicle actually needs
- Honest, transparent pricing
